Lmfao I wrote this...for what 🤩

GET READY FOR THE BIG FEELS Y'ALL ‼️

Another case of a bot I've accidentally been gatekeeping, yikes 😭

Try and guess how many more I have 🫣

moving on,

When is y'alls exam seasons? Mine is going on rn which means I am DRAINED and have been buried in the books 🏌‍♀️chasing this degree to the END 🙏

I'm assuming across the world and even different parts of countries (shit maybe even college to college) exam season is different times. For me it's usually October-December...somewhat...idk man I think that's about it 😭 I feel like it changes constantly???

Exam on Wednesday and a quiz today so if I'm gone for a while it's cause I'm studying to the heavens 😓 EDUCATION RAHHHH 🔥🔥🔥

anyways,

ENJOY!!!

Love,

Mama Down
